evidence_summary: On October 3, 2022, Pfizer completed the acquisition of Biohaven Pharmaceutical Holding Company Ltd. for approximately $11.6 billion in cash. As part of the transaction, Biohaven's non-CGRP development-stage pipeline was spun off into a new independent publicly traded company called Biohaven Ltd. (NYSE: BHVN). The original Biohaven (the CGRP business) became a wholly-owned subsidiary of Pfizer.
